dsl_rule.translation_notes: Used Donchian Channel (dc_upper/dc_lower) to represent 4-week highest high and lowest low breakouts. The 4-week lookback period (20 trading days) maps to standard Donchian parameters. Exit conditions reversed entry logic per AUTHOR_SILENT rule (reversal system). Stop loss of 2.0% applied as a reasonable risk limit for trend-following system. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to support both long and short entries.

backtest_rule.reason: Used Donchian Channel (dc_upper/dc_lower) to represent 4-week highest high and lowest low breakouts. The 4-week lookback period (20 trading days) maps to standard Donchian parameters. Exit conditions reversed entry logic per AUTHOR_SILENT rule (reversal system). Stop loss of 2.0% applied as a reasonable risk limit for trend-following system. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to support both long and short entries.

source_rule_text: Enter a trade when price breaks out of the highest high or lowest low of the previous 4 weeks, following the trend with defined risk limits.
